edgeCases: Evidence-JSON rejection: <feature>-<role>.json files parse a feature that differs from the file basename, so ActiveWorkflows skips them — a role like qa-senior never renders as an active row.
Ad-hoc roadmap JSONs (roadmap.json, roadmap-quality.json) have no matching feature field and are never treated as workflows.
Done workflows (currentStep == done) are excluded while a genuine non-done sibling still renders.
Dedupe: multiple evidence JSONs for one feature plus its genuine state file collapse to exactly one ACTIVE WORKFLOWS row.
Mtime recency: survivors sort by workflow-file modification time descending.
Cap + '+N more': above the cap of 5 only the 5 most-recent rows show with a +N more hint; at/below cap no hint; max<=0 means no cap.
Cross-phase FirstIncomplete: when every Phase 0 feature is done the walk continues into later phases (first incomplete across ALL phases).
Roadmap-complete empty state: every feature done yields a 'Roadmap complete' line with no next-feature name and no docs/features/<next>.md pointer; exit 0.
Missing/invalid roadmap.json both exit 0 emitting nothing (no rehydration payload, no crash).
Pointers-as-paths-only: the payload lists PROJECT.md and docs/features/<next>.md as paths and never inlines their contents (asserted via absence of inlined brief headings).
Source-independence: the SessionStart payload is identical across startup|clear|compact|resume.
